message:
test(mux-client): add channel backpressure verification test

New test pane_delta_try_send_succeeds_after_capacity_is_freed that
verifies bounded channel backpressure behavior: fills channel to
capacity, confirms try_send fails, drains one message, and verifies
try_send succeeds again. Ensures the mux client correctly handles
channel-full conditions without dropping messages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
